writers.lyricist: David Lubega/Axel Benjamin Konrad/Alfred Hans Zoller/Ole Wierk
writers.composer: David Lubega/Axel Benjamin Konrad/Alfred Hans Zoller/Ole Wierk

lyrics.text: She hangs out every day nearby the beach
lyrics.translation: 她总是在就近的海滩走走看看

lyrics.text: Having a Heineken falling asleep
lyrics.translation: 手中一瓶喜力，总让她微微醺

lyrics.text: She looks so sexy when she's walking the sand
lyrics.translation: 当她走过海滩，性感得那么惊艳

lyrics.text: Nobody ever put a ring on her hand
lyrics.translation: 但是没有一人向她求婚

lyrics.text: Swim to the oceanshore fish in the sea
lyrics.translation: 在海滨游泳，在海里捕鱼

lyrics.text: She is the story the story is she
lyrics.translation: 她是传说中的她

lyrics.text: She sings to the moon and the stars in the sky
lyrics.translation: 对着天空中的星月，哼着小曲

lyrics.text: Shining from high above you shouldn't ask why
lyrics.translation: 不要问为何它们在一闪一闪

lyrics.text: She is the one that you never forget
lyrics.translation: 她就是你念念不忘的那个女孩呀

lyrics.text: She is the heaven-sent angel you met
lyrics.translation: 她就是你所见的天堂所派的天使呀

lyrics.text: Oh, she must be the reason why God made a girl
lyrics.translation: 恩，她诠释了上帝为何会创造女孩

lyrics.text: She is so pretty all over the world
lyrics.translation: 她一定是这世上最可爱的女孩

lyrics.text: She puts the rhythm, the beat in the drum
lyrics.translation: 因为她，鼓点才有了节奏

lyrics.text: She comes in the morning, in the evening she's gone
lyrics.translation: 清晨中她带来阳光，夜幕下她轻轻离去

lyrics.text: Every little hour every second you live
lyrics.translation: 在你生命的分分秒秒

lyrics.text: Trust in eternity that's what she gives
lyrics.translation: 毫不怀疑她给的一切

lyrics.text: She looks like Marilyn, walks likeSuzanne
lyrics.translation: 她美得像玛丽莲，走路又如苏姗妮

lyrics.text: She talks like Monica and Marianne
lyrics.translation: 她说话像莫尼卡也像玛丽安

lyrics.text: She wins in everything that she might do
lyrics.translation: 她在她能做的一切事情上力争成功

lyrics.text: And she will respect you forever just you
lyrics.translation: 而且她会永远维护你，是的，只有你

lyrics.text: She is the one that you never forget
lyrics.translation: 她就是你念念不忘的那个女孩呀

lyrics.text: She is the heaven-sent angel you met
lyrics.translation: 她就是你所见的天堂所派的天使呀

lyrics.text: Oh, she must be the reason why God made a girl
lyrics.translation: 恩，她诠释了上帝为何会创造女孩

lyrics.text: She is so pretty all over the world
lyrics.translation: 她一定是这世上最可爱的女孩

lyrics.text: She is so pretty all over the world
lyrics.translation: 她一定是这世上最可爱的女孩

lyrics.text: She is so pretty
lyrics.translation: 她真的很可爱

lyrics.text: She is like you and me
lyrics.translation: 她便是你，也是我

lyrics.text: Like them like we
lyrics.translation: 是她们，也是我们

lyrics.text: She is in you and me
lyrics.translation: 在你我心中

lyrics.text: She is the one that you never forget
lyrics.translation: 她就是你念念不忘的那个女孩呀

lyrics.text: She is the heaven-sent angel you met
lyrics.translation: 她就是你所见的天堂所派的天使呀

lyrics.translation: 她一定是这世上最可爱的女孩

lyrics.text: (She is the one) She is the one
lyrics.translation: （就是她呢）就是她呢

lyrics.text: (That you never forget) That you never forget
lyrics.translation: （让你念念不忘）让你念念不忘

lyrics.text: She is the heaven-sent angel you met
lyrics.translation: 她就是你所见的天堂所派的天使呀

lyrics.text: She's the reason (oh she must be the reason) why God made a girl
lyrics.translation: 她是上帝创造女孩的缘由（是的，她一定是的）

lyrics.text: She is so pretty all over the world (oh...)
lyrics.translation: 她一定是这世上最可爱的女孩（哦...）

lyrics.text: Na na na na na …
